subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Thou art the Pardoner, the Forgiver, the All-Merciful. Thou lookest not upon our faults but nourisheth us with Thy bounty. Thou coverest our sins and granteth us shelter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگار عفوی و غفوری و آمرزگاری خطا ننگری عطا پروری گناه بپوشی پناه ببخشی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @prayer for forgiveness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
